description: Higher-order functions and operations on callable objects.

functions.name: partial

params.name: *args
params.description: Positional arguments to freeze into the partial

params.name: **kwargs
params.description: Keyword arguments to freeze into the partial

returns.description: A partial object that behaves like func called with the frozen arguments

functions.description: Returns a new partial object which, when called, behaves like func called with the positional arguments args and keyword arguments kwargs. Additional arguments supplied to the call are appended.

functions.name: reduce

params.name: function
params.description: A two-argument function to apply cumulatively

params.name: initializer
params.description: Optional initial value placed before the items of the iterable in the reduction

returns.description: The single result of cumulatively applying function to the items

functions.description: Apply function of two arguments cumulatively to the items of iterable, from left to right, so as to reduce the iterable to a single value. Equivalent to the built-in reduce() in Python 2.7.

functions.name: wraps

params.name: assigned
params.description: Tuple of attribute names to assign from wrapped to wrapper. Defaults to WRAPPER_ASSIGNMENTS.

params.name: updated
params.description: Tuple of attribute names to update from wrapped to wrapper. Defaults to WRAPPER_UPDATES.

returns.description: A decorator that applies update_wrapper to the decorated function

functions.description: A decorator factory that invokes update_wrapper() on the decorated function. Use this to preserve the original function's metadata (__name__, __doc__, etc.) when writing wrapper functions.

functions.name: update_wrapper

params.name: assigned
params.description: Tuple of attribute names to assign directly. Defaults to WRAPPER_ASSIGNMENTS (__module__, __name__, __doc__).

params.name: updated
params.description: Tuple of attribute names to update. Defaults to WRAPPER_UPDATES (__dict__).

returns.description: The wrapper function with updated attributes

functions.description: Updates a wrapper function to look like the wrapped function by copying attributes such as __name__, __module__, __doc__, and __dict__.

functions.name: total_ordering

params.name: cls
params.description: A class that defines __eq__ and one of __lt__, __le__, __gt__, or __ge__

returns.description: The class with all rich comparison methods filled in

functions.description: Class decorator that fills in missing rich comparison methods (__lt__, __le__, __gt__, __ge__) given a class that defines __eq__ and one other. Avoids boilerplate of writing all comparison methods.

functions.name: cmp_to_key

params.name: func
params.description: An old-style comparison function that accepts two arguments and returns negative, zero, or positive

returns.description: A key function suitable for use with sorted(), min(), max(), etc.

functions.description: Transforms an old-style comparison function into a key function for use with tools that accept key functions (such as sorted(), min(), max()). Useful for converting Python 2 cmp-style comparisons.

classes.name: partial
classes.description: A partial object returned by functools.partial(). When called, it behaves like the original function called with the frozen positional and keyword arguments, plus any additional arguments supplied at call time.

params.name: func
params.description: The original callable to partially apply

constructors.description: Create a new partial object with the given function and frozen arguments.

fields.name: func
fields.description: The original callable that will be invoked with frozen and additional arguments

fields.name: args
fields.description: The frozen positional arguments prepended to calls to the partial object

fields.name: keywords
fields.description: The frozen keyword arguments supplied to calls to the partial object
